name: Mit School Bus SVC
recent_news: No web presence found; address (1910 Towne Centre Blvd #250, Annapolis) is a UPS Store / mail-drop suite, suggesting this is a registered-agent/mailbox shell rather than an operating bus yard.
fit_notes: Likely too small / possibly non-operating; address pattern suggests shell or owner-operator with 1-2 buses. Not a meaningful tuck-in for Summit absent further validation.

name: Midwest Scholars TRNSPRTN LLC
recent_news: No web presence or news found; Norwood OH address (2710 Park Ave #432) is a multi-tenant building / likely mail suite. No district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Likely a very small owner-operator or shell entity in greater Cincinnati. Too small / unverified to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; would need direct sourcing call to confirm operations.

name: Aleksander Cohen-Harris Bus
recent_news: No web/news footprint located. Fairfield OH suite 9651 Seward Rd #120 appears to be a small office condo. Likely a micro family operator (Robert C. Harris listed as Manager).
fit_notes: Very small (3 employees, ~$124K rev) suggests 1-3 buses or charter run; below tuck-in scale for Summit unless part of a larger consolidator roll-up in greater Cincinnati.

name: Kansas Central School Bus
recent_news: Long-standing contractor for Paola USD 368 since ~2010; district pays ~$51K per bus annually (fuel excluded, district spent ~$81,500 on fuel). Operates from 1705 Industrial Park Dr, Paola. Phone (913) 294-9610.
fit_notes: Genuine independent district contractor (single-district, ~15-bus scale in Paola, KS) - small but real tuck-in profile in Summit's expansion geography. Worth a sourcing call to gauge owner succession; Kitty Anderson appears to be longtime operator.

name: School Shuttle Squad LLC
recent_news: Newly formed FL LLC (2024) at residential address 1134 E Lombardy Dr, Deltona; no district contracts or web presence identified. Volusia County Schools runs its own transportation in-house, so this is likely private/charter/SPED shuttle, not a yellow-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Brand-new 2-person home-based LLC; not a viable tuck-in for Summit. Volusia Co. schools self-operate, limiting upside in this market for any small private operator.
